target: 20. Visit from Sou
Hey, Shinpei! Sorry... Am I a bit early?
(Investigating the <color=#GF_TIPS_048>Hishigata Clinic</color>. Sou is my only breakthrough.)
(I should be able to trust him. Sou risked his life to protect Mio.)
No, I've been waiting for you... Sou.
Hey, Shinpei!
Sou…
Sorry... Am I a bit early?
No, I've been waiting for you.
(First, I need to share what I know with him.)
(That way I can organize my thoughts, and more importantly--)
(Sou Hishigata. I can rely on him...!)
(I'll tell him everything.)
(About Ushio's death. And the Shadows...)
Okay... Just the three of us can talk here.
Sou, listen to what I have to say first.
Y-Yeah.
And you too, Mio... I'll explain what happened at the Kobayakawa house again.
…Yeah.
(Sou quietly listened to my story until the end.)
In that house, I met Shiori-chan... No, a Shadow in the shape of Shiori-chan.

Shiori-chan had already become a Shadow
before Ushio's funeral.

…So, Sou…
I…
I get it.
Ushio was killed by Shiori-chan's Shadow. That's what you're thinking, right...
Yeah…
The Yoshikawa lines on Ushio's neck... strangulation... It's true... the only one who could've done that back then was...
That's impossible… Shiori-chan…
...And next, Mio-chan is really being targeted?

Yeah…
I saw it with my own eyes…
(Come on, just say it. Say that Mio was killed right in front of my eyes.)
(No, I can't--)
(...If I say that, I'll have to tell them that I'm repeating the same days...!!)
(Isn't that way too crazy of a story to just suddenly drop on them?)
(But... Lies and secrets always lead to things falling apart.)
(If that happens, they might not believe anything I say anymore.)
(Rather than letting that happen, maybe it'd be better to just confess everything here...)
…Shin-chan?
(...But how should I tell them? "I was actually killed twice myself" !?)
(If they think I'm messing around, they won't even believe the crucial part about the Shadows...)
Shinpei!
Huh...? Ah, yeah, sorry. I got lost in thought for a bit.
Shadows and real humans-- Can you tell them apart at a glance?
...No. I couldn't tell the difference just by looking. At least, I couldn't...
I see, that's gonna be a problem...
Meaning, even you, the one telling us this, might be a Shadow.
...That's right. But the same goes for you...

What is this…?
What even is a Shadow?
Calm down, Mio-chan.
Basically, these Shadows...
Think of them as creatures... that have lived on Hitogashima since ancient times.
Creatures...
Creatures that mimic people... Creatures that turn the original person they copied into a "stain" like a shadow... is that it?
Yeah... Since they show up on camera, they're living creatures that physically exist there, unlike ghosts or spirits...!!
If they're living creatures, there has to be a way to deal with them. Right, Shinpei!!
Yeah… That's true!
(As expected of Sou. Being able to calmly analyze things like this shows he really is cut out to be a doctor.)
(It really was the right choice to tell him. He's so reliable...)
Hey, Shin-chan! Why don't we go to Hiruko Cave right now!?
Huh?
Karikiri-san should be familiar with the island's history, so he might know something about the Shadows too...!!
(That's right... Mio and I were originally planning to go to Hiruko Cave...)
(But I can't...! At least, not right now!!)
(That Shadow is near the shrine. It's too dangerous to get close!!)
Um... If we're going to go, c-can we do it tomorrow?
Tomorrow? Tomorrow is the... <color=#GF_TIPS_106>Hitogashima Summer Festival</color>, you know!?

!!?
Oh… the festival…
I knew it... you totally forgot! Tomorrow is the busiest day of the year for the shrine...
Even Karikiri-san, the chief priest, probably won't have time to deal with us, right?
No...! If that's the case, it might actually be more convenient.
The Shadows probably hate lively places. The more crowded the festival is, the lower the chances of us being attacked.
Yeah, that might be true. Since they sneak around disguised as people...
Okay, let's go with that plan.
Then see you tomorrow, Tokiko and I will come pick you up at 5!
Got it.
Right, let's decide on a password. So that if I run into your Shadows, I can tell you apart from the real ones!
A password?
If I say "Mountain"...
…River?
Idiot!! Anyone would say that!
Th-Then... The Tigris and Euphrates rivers.
Let's step away from rivers, Shinpei...
<color=#GF_TIPS_063>Mesopotamian civilization</color>.
Mio-chan, that's it!!
Eh...
Mesopotamian civilization!!
(Is this really going to be okay...)
Shin-chan, did you memorize it? It's Mesopotamian civilization!
Yeah, I've got it memorized. More importantly...

Thanks, Sou…
For believing this story.
Don't be so distant...!!
You believed in me and told me all this, right?
Yeah…
(I still don't completely trust him... Not until I find a way to tell the difference between a Shadow and the real person.)
(The part of me looking at the big picture... is always so quick to rain on the parade.)

Oh, and I have something
I want to look into too!
If I figure anything out, I'll let you know!!
Yikes, a sudden shower!
The forecast is really unreliable~. It's just a sudden shower, so let's take shelter here.
Shin-chan…
Huh? What?
U-um...
A-About tomorrow, Karikiri-san... When do you think he'll be free?
I wonder... The mikoshi parade starts in the evening, and he'll probably be super busy with preparations before that...
Probably after the Umi-okuri.

The Umi-okuri is from 8:30 PM,
and the fireworks start at 8 PM…
Mio?
H-Hey... There's something I want to ask you.

Shin-chan…
How long are you staying on the island?
Ah, right... I was thinking of leaving a little while after the funeral, but now, who knows...
I wish you could stay forever.
Just kidding! I-I was just saying...
Just kidding!! Here, hold out your hand!!
Hm?
I'll give this to you. The necklace my sister was wearing at the end.
My sister would definitely be happier if you had it, Shin-chan.
…Thank you.
